get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.heading_zh: 获取 Google 扩展评论结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_extended_reviews_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google Extended Reviews task by its id, returning the establishment's aggregated rating and the collected review entries, including reviews sourced from third-party sites.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 扩展评论任务结果，返回商家的综合评分及采集到的评论条目，并包含来自第三方站点的评论。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.heading_zh: 获取 Google 扩展评论已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_extended_reviews_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.desc_en: List Google Extended Reviews tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected via the matching task_get endpoint.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_exte.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可通过对应 task_get 端点拉取的 Google 扩展评论任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 酒店信息 HTML post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_info_live_html
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve Google hotel info for a given hotel identifier and stay dates, returning the captured result as raw HTML pages in a single request.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_hot.description_zh: 针对给定酒店标识与入住日期，同步获取 Google 酒店信息，并在单次请求中以原始 HTML 页面形式返回采集结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店信息 HTML 结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_info_task_get_html_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: Fetch the HTML results of a previously created advanced Google Hotel Info task by its id.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的高级 Google 酒店信息任务的 HTML 结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店信息已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_info_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: List Google Hotel Info tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 酒店信息任务。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店搜索结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_searches_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google Hotel Searches task by its id, returning matched hotel listings with pricing, location and rating data.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 酒店搜索任务结果，返回匹配的酒店列表及其价格、位置与评分数据。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.heading_zh: 获取 Google 酒店搜索已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hotel_searches_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.desc_en: List Google Hotel Searches tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_hote.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 酒店搜索任务。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.heading_zh: 获取 Google 商家信息结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_business_info_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google My Business Info task by its id, returning the full business profile: categories, address, contacts, ratings, attributes, working and popular hours, and any directory sub-listings.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 商家信息任务结果，返回完整的商家档案：分类、地址、联系方式、评分、属性、营业与热门时段，以及目录子条目。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.heading_zh: 获取 Google 商家信息已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_business_info_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.desc_en: List Google My Business Info tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_b.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 商家信息任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.heading_zh: 创建 Google 商家动态任务 post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_business_updates_task_post
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects Google My Business posts/updates for a named establishment; poll tasks_ready and then fetch results by id.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_my_.description_zh: 创建一个异步任务，采集指定商家的 Google 商家动态/帖子；随后轮询 tasks_ready 并按 id 拉取结果。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.heading_zh: 实时获取 Google 商家问答 post_dataforseo_business_data_google_questions_and_answers_live
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve the Questions and Answers section of a Google My Business listing for the named establishment, returning both answered and unanswered questions.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.description_zh: 针对指定商家，同步获取其 Google 商家页面的问答区，返回已回答与未回答的问题。

post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.heading_zh: 创建 Google 商家问答任务 post_dataforseo_business_data_google_questions_and_answers_task_post
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects the Questions and Answers section of a Google My Business listing; poll tasks_ready and fetch results by id.
post_dataforseo_business_data_google_que.description_zh: 创建一个异步任务，采集 Google 商家页面的问答区；随后轮询 tasks_ready 并按 id 拉取结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.heading_zh: 获取 Google 评论结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_reviews_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Google Reviews task by its id, returning the establishment's aggregated rating and individual review entries.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Google 评论任务结果，返回商家的综合评分及单条评论条目。

get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.heading_zh: 获取 Google 评论已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_google_reviews_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.desc_en: List Google Reviews tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_google_revi.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Google 评论任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.heading_zh: 实时获取 Reddit 社媒数据 post_dataforseo_business_data_social_media_reddit_live
post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.desc_en: Synchronously retrieve Reddit mentions (subreddit posts that share the URL) for one or more target pages, returning the subreddit and post details for each.
post_dataforseo_business_data_social_med.description_zh: 针对一个或多个目标页面，同步获取其在 Reddit 上的提及（分享该 URL 的 subreddit 帖子），并返回各自的 subreddit 与帖子详情。

post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.heading_zh: 创建 Tripadvisor 评论任务 post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor_reviews_task_post
post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects Tripadvisor reviews for a business identified by URL path or keyword, with optional filters by rating, traveler type, visit month and review keyword.
post_dataforseo_business_data_tripadviso.description_zh: 创建一个异步任务，采集由 URL 路径或关键词指定商家的 Tripadvisor 评论，并可按评分、出行者类型、到访月份及评论关键词进行筛选。

get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.heading_zh: 获取 Tripadvisor 搜索结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor_search_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Tripadvisor Search task by its id, returning matched business listings with category, price rate and rating data.
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Tripadvisor 搜索任务结果，返回匹配的商家列表及其分类、价格水平与评分数据。

get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.heading_zh: 获取 Tripadvisor 搜索已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor_search_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.desc_en: List Tripadvisor Search tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_tripadvisor.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Tripadvisor 搜索任务。

post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.heading_zh: 创建 Trustpilot 评论任务 post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_reviews_task_post
post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.desc_en: Create an asynchronous task that collects Trustpilot reviews for an establishment identified by its domain; poll tasks_ready and fetch results by id.
post_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot.description_zh: 创建一个异步任务，采集由域名指定商家的 Trustpilot 评论；随后轮询 tasks_ready 并按 id 拉取结果。

get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.heading_zh: 获取 Trustpilot 搜索结果 get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_search_task_get_id
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.desc_en: Fetch the results of a previously created Trustpilot Search task by its id, returning matched establishments with their domain, review count and rating data.
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.description_zh: 按任务 id 拉取此前创建的 Trustpilot 搜索任务结果，返回匹配的商家及其域名、评论数与评分数据。

get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.heading_zh: 获取 Trustpilot 搜索已完成任务 get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_search_tasks_ready
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.desc_en: List Trustpilot Search tasks that have finished processing and are ready to be collected.
get_dataforseo_business_data_trustpilot_.description_zh: 列出已处理完成、可供拉取的 Trustpilot 搜索任务。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual payload of this task.
result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.keyword.desc_en: Keyword echoed from the POST request, with percent-encoding decoded (a `+` becomes a space).
result.keyword.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的关键词，已解码百分号转义（`+` 会被还原为空格）。

result.type.desc_en: Search engine type echoed from the POST request.
result.type.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎类型。

result.se_domain.desc_en: Search engine domain echoed from the POST request.
result.se_domain.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎域名。

result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the POST request.
result.location_code.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的地区代码。

result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the POST request.
result.language_code.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的语言代码。

result.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the search engine results page, so you can verify the data against the live SERP.
result.check_url.title_zh: 指向搜索引擎结果页的直达 URL，可用于将数据与实时 SERP 核对。

result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp when the result was collected, formatted `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.datetime.title_zh: 结果采集的时间（UTC），格式为 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.title.desc_en: Name of the local establishment that the 'reviews' SERP element collects reviews for.
result.title.title_zh: SERP 中 'reviews' 元素所采集评论对应的本地商家名称。

result.sub_title.desc_en: Supplementary information (such as the address) shown beneath the title of the 'reviews' element.
result.sub_title.title_zh: 'reviews' 元素标题下方展示的补充信息（如地址）。

result.rating.desc_en: Aggregated rating of the entity, as shown in the SERP.
result.rating.title_zh: 该实体的综合评分，与 SERP 中展示的一致。

result.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
result.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

result.value.desc_en: Average rating value computed from all reviews.
result.value.title_zh: 基于全部评论计算出的平均评分值。

result.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes (ratings) the rating is based on.
result.votes_count.title_zh: 该评分所依据的投票（打分）数量。

result.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
result.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

result.feature_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the 'reviews' SERP element (feature id).
result.feature_id.title_zh: SERP 中 'reviews' 元素的唯一标识（feature id）。

result.place_id.desc_en: Google-assigned unique identifier of the business location (place id).
result.place_id.title_zh: Google 为该商家地点分配的唯一标识（place id）。

result.cid.desc_en: Google-defined client id (cid), a unique id of the local establishment.
result.cid.title_zh: Google 定义的客户端 id（cid），本地商家的唯一标识。

result.reviews_count.desc_en: Total number of reviews available for the establishment.
result.reviews_count.title_zh: 该商家可获取的评论总数。

result.items_count.desc_en: Number of elements returned in the `items` array; raise the `depth` parameter at task creation to get more.
result.items_count.title_zh: `items` 数组中返回的元素数量；在创建任务时调大 `depth` 参数可获取更多。

items.desc_en: Review entries collected for the establishment; raise `depth` at task creation to retrieve more.
items.title_zh: 为该商家采集到的评论条目；创建任务时调大 `depth` 可获取更多。

items.type.desc_en: Element type marker of the review entry.
items.type.title_zh: 评论条目的元素类型标记。

items.rank_group.desc_en: Position of this entry within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.
items.rank_group.title_zh: 该条目在相同 `type` 元素分组内的位置。

items.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute position of this review among all listed reviews.
items.rank_absolute.title_zh: 该评论在全部已列出评论中的绝对位置。

items.position.desc_en: Alignment of the review within the SERP layout.
items.position.title_zh: 评论在 SERP 版式中的对齐位置。

items.xpath.desc_en: XPath locating this review element within the parsed page.
items.xpath.title_zh: 在解析页面中定位该评论元素的 XPath。

items.review_text.desc_en: Body text of the review (auto-translated when applicable).
items.review_text.title_zh: 评论正文内容（在适用时为自动翻译后的文本）。

items.original_review_text.desc_en: Review body in its original language, with no auto-translation applied.
items.original_review_text.title_zh: 评论正文的原始语言版本，未做自动翻译。

items.time_ago.desc_en: Relative publication time of the review in 'time ago' wording.
items.time_ago.title_zh: 评论发布时间的相对表述（'time ago' 格式）。

items.timestamp.desc_en: Absolute publication time of the review in UTC, `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
items.timestamp.title_zh: 评论发布的绝对时间（UTC），格式 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

items.rating.desc_en: Rating score given by the reviewer.
items.rating.title_zh: 该评论作者给出的评分。

items.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
items.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

items.value.desc_en: Numeric value of the reviewer's rating.
items.value.title_zh: 该评论作者评分的数值。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of helpfulness votes this review received.
items.votes_count.title_zh: 该评论获得的有用性投票数。

items.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
items.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

items.reviews_count.desc_en: Total number of reviews the reviewer has submitted overall.
items.reviews_count.title_zh: 该评论作者累计提交的评论总数。

items.photos_count.desc_en: Total number of photos the reviewer has submitted overall.
items.photos_count.title_zh: 该评论作者累计提交的照片总数。

items.local_guide.desc_en: Whether the reviewer holds Google 'Local Guide' status.
items.local_guide.title_zh: 该评论作者是否拥有 Google '本地向导'（Local Guide）身份。

items.profile_name.desc_en: Display name of the reviewer's profile.
items.profile_name.title_zh: 评论作者的资料显示名称。

items.profile_url.title_zh: 评论作者的资料页 URL。

items.review_url.desc_en: URL pointing directly to this review.
items.review_url.title_zh: 直接指向该评论的 URL。

items.profile_image_url.desc_en: URL of the reviewer's profile image.
items.profile_image_url.title_zh: 评论作者的头像图片 URL。

items.owner_answer.desc_en: Owner's reply text to the review (auto-translated when applicable).
items.owner_answer.title_zh: 商家所有者对该评论的回复文本（适用时为自动翻译）。

items.original_owner_answer.desc_en: Owner's reply in its original language, with no auto-translation applied.
items.original_owner_answer.title_zh: 商家所有者回复的原始语言版本，未做自动翻译。

items.owner_time_ago.desc_en: Relative time of the owner's reply in 'time ago' wording.
items.owner_time_ago.title_zh: 商家回复时间的相对表述（'time ago' 格式）。

items.owner_timestamp.desc_en: Absolute time of the owner's reply in UTC, `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
items.owner_timestamp.title_zh: 商家回复的绝对时间（UTC），格式 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

items.review_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the review on Google.
items.review_id.title_zh: 该评论在 Google 上的唯一标识。

items.images.desc_en: Images attached to the review by the reviewer.
items.images.title_zh: 评论作者随评论附上的图片。

items.alt.desc_en: Alt text of the review image.
items.alt.title_zh: 评论图片的 alt 替代文本。

items.image_url.desc_en: URL of an image featured in the review.
items.image_url.title_zh: 评论中所附图片的 URL。

items.review_highlights.desc_en: Highlighted review criteria together with their assessments.
items.review_highlights.title_zh: 评论中被高亮的评价维度及其评价结论。

items.assessment.desc_en: Assessment given for the reviewed feature.
items.assessment.title_zh: 针对被评价特性给出的评价结论。

items.source.desc_en: Information about the external source the review was posted on.
items.source.title_zh: 该评论所发布外部来源的相关信息。

items.title.desc_en: Name of the source site where the review was posted.
items.title.title_zh: 该评论所发布来源站点的名称。

items.image.desc_en: Featured image of the review source.

items.domain.desc_en: Domain of the source site where the review was posted.
items.domain.title_zh: 该评论所发布来源站点的域名。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch. The task remains retrievable for 30 days after creation.
id.title_zh: 要拉取结果的任务 UUID。任务自创建起 30 天内可随时取回结果。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual payload of this task.
result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task that is now ready to be collected; pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to download the results.
result.id.title_zh: 已完成、可供拉取的任务的 UUID；将其传给对应的 `task_get` 端点即可下载结果。

result.se.desc_en: Search engine the completed task was set for.
result.se.title_zh: 该已完成任务所针对的搜索引擎。

result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the completed task was set for.
result.se_type.title_zh: 该已完成任务所针对的搜索引擎类型。

result.date_posted.desc_en: Timestamp (UTC) when the task was originally submitted.

result.tag.desc_en: User-defined label that was attached to the task when it was created, echoed back for matching.
result.tag.title_zh: 创建任务时附加的用户自定义标签，原样回显以便匹配。

result.endpoint.desc_en: Relative endpoint URL to call for collecting this completed task's results.
result.endpoint.title_zh: 用于拉取该已完成任务结果的相对端点 URL。

hotel_identifier.desc_en: Unique identifier of a hotel entity in Google search. Obtain it from the Google SERP API `hotels` element or from the Hotel Searches endpoint.
hotel_identifier.title_zh: Google 搜索中酒店实体的唯一标识。可从 Google SERP API 的 `hotels` 元素或 Hotel Searches 端点获取。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` runs at normal priority, `2` runs at high priority for faster turnaround at an extra charge.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 为普通优先级，`2` 为高优先级，可更快返回但会额外计费。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) that sets the geographic context of the search. Provide this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; the available list comes from the corresponding `/locations` endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定搜索的地理范围。需在此与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 中择一提供；可用列表来自对应的 `/locations` 端点。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code that sets the geographic context of the search. Provide this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; the available list comes from the corresponding `/locations` endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区代码，用于设定搜索的地理范围。需在此与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 中择一提供；可用列表来自对应的 `/locations` 端点。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates that set the geographic context of the search, in `latitude,longitude` (some endpoints also accept a radius). Provide this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 用于设定搜索地理范围的 GPS 坐标，格式为 `latitude,longitude`（部分端点还接受半径）。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Provide this or `language_code`; the available list comes from the corresponding `/languages` endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用列表来自对应的 `/languages` 端点。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Provide this or `language_name`; the available list comes from the corresponding `/languages` endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用列表来自对应的 `/languages` 端点。

check_in.desc_en: Check-in date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; if omitted, tomorrow's date is used.
check_in.title_zh: 入住日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；不填则默认使用明天的日期。

check_out.desc_en: Check-out date in `yyyy-mm-dd`; if omitted, two days from now is used.
check_out.title_zh: 退房日期，格式 `yyyy-mm-dd`；不填则默认使用后天的日期。

currency.desc_en: Currency for the returned prices, e.g. `USD`.
currency.title_zh: 返回价格所用的货币，例如 `USD`。

adults.desc_en: Number of adult guests; if omitted, two adults are assumed.
adults.title_zh: 成人入住人数；不填则默认按两名成人计算。

children.desc_en: Children to include, as an array of their ages (e.g. `[13,8]`); if omitted, no children are included.
children.title_zh: 随行儿童，以年龄数组表示（如 `[13,8]`）；不填则不计入儿童。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task (up to 255 characters). It is echoed back in the response `data` so you can match results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务自定义的标签（最多 255 个字符）。会在响应的 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求匹配。

items.discount_text.title_zh: 描述所应用折扣的文本。

items.check_in.desc_en: Check-in date and time in UTC, `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.

items.category_ids.title_zh: 通用分类 ID，不随所选国家变化。

items.additional_categories.desc_en: Additional Google My Business categories describing the business in more detail.
items.additional_categories.title_zh: 更细致描述该商家的附加 Google 商家分类。

items.cid.desc_en: Google-defined client id (cid), unique id of the local establishment.
items.cid.title_zh: Google 定义的客户端 id（cid），本地商家的唯一标识。

items.feature_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the element in the SERP (feature id).
items.feature_id.title_zh: SERP 中该元素的唯一标识（feature id）。

items.address_info.desc_en: Object holding the structured address components of the business.
items.address_info.title_zh: 包含商家结构化地址组成部分的对象。

items.borough.desc_en: Administrative unit or district the business location belongs to.
items.borough.title_zh: 商家所在的行政区或辖区。

items.city.desc_en: City where the business is located.

items.region.desc_en: DMA region of the business location.
items.region.title_zh: 商家所在的 DMA 区域。

items.country_code.desc_en: ISO country code of the business location.
items.country_code.title_zh: 商家所在地的 ISO 国家代码。

items.place_id.desc_en: Google place id of the local establishment featured in the element.
items.place_id.title_zh: 元素中所示本地商家的 Google place id。

items.url.desc_en: Absolute URL of the business website.

items.contact_url.desc_en: URL of the preferred contact page.

items.contributor_url.desc_en: URL of the user's or entity's Local Guides profile, when available.
items.contributor_url.title_zh: 用户或实体的 Local Guides 资料页 URL（如有）。

items.book_online_url.desc_en: URL behind the element's 'book online' button, leading to the booking/order page.
items.book_online_url.title_zh: 元素中 'book online' 按钮指向的 URL，通往预订/下单页面。

items.logo.desc_en: URL of the logo shown on the Google My Business profile.
items.logo.title_zh: Google 商家资料中展示的 logo URL。

items.main_image.desc_en: URL of the main image shown on the Google My Business profile.
items.main_image.title_zh: Google 商家资料中展示的主图 URL。

items.total_photos.desc_en: Total number of images featured on the Google My Business profile.
items.total_photos.title_zh: Google 商家资料中收录的图片总数。

items.snippet.desc_en: Additional descriptive information about the business.
items.snippet.title_zh: 关于该商家的附加描述信息。

items.latitude.desc_en: Latitude of the establishment on Google Maps.
items.latitude.title_zh: 商家在 Google 地图上的纬度。

items.longitude.desc_en: Longitude of the establishment on Google Maps.
items.longitude.title_zh: 商家在 Google 地图上的经度。

items.is_claimed.desc_en: Whether the entity is verified by its owner on Google Maps.
items.is_claimed.title_zh: 该实体是否已由其所有者在 Google 地图上认领验证。

items.attributes.desc_en: Service details presented as user-reviewed checks, based on user feedback and the business category.
items.attributes.title_zh: 以用户核验勾选形式呈现的服务详情，依据用户反馈与商家分类生成。

items.available_attributes.desc_en: Attributes the business is indicated to offer.
items.available_attributes.title_zh: 标识为该商家提供的属性。

items.unavailable_attributes.desc_en: Attributes the business is indicated not to offer.
items.unavailable_attributes.title_zh: 标识为该商家不提供的属性。

items.place_topics.desc_en: Most popular keywords mentioned in customer reviews, each mapped to how many reviews mention it.
items.place_topics.title_zh: 客户评论中最常被提及的关键词，每个关键词对应其被提及的评论数。

items.rating.desc_en: Aggregated rating of the entity, as shown in the SERP.
items.rating.title_zh: 该实体的综合评分，与 SERP 中展示的一致。

items.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
items.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes the rating is based on.
items.votes_count.title_zh: 该评分所依据的投票数。

items.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
items.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

items.rating_distribution.desc_en: Breakdown of how many 1- to 5-star ratings the business received.
items.rating_distribution.title_zh: 该商家所获 1 至 5 星评分各自数量的分布。

items.people_also_search.desc_en: Related business entities that users also searched for.
items.people_also_search.title_zh: 用户还会搜索的相关商家实体。

items.work_time.title_zh: 商家营业时间的相关详情。

items.work_hours.desc_en: Working hours information of the establishment.

items.current_status.desc_en: Current operating status of the establishment; business meaning of values: `opened`, `closed`, `temporarily_closed`, `closed_forever`.
items.current_status.title_zh: 商家当前的营业状态；取值业务含义：`opened` 营业中、`closed` 已关门、`temporarily_closed` 暂停营业、`closed_forever` 永久关闭。

popular_times.desc_en: Popularity-by-hour information indicating the busy hours of the business.
popular_times.title_zh: 按小时统计的热门时段信息，反映商家的繁忙时间。

popular_times.popular_times_by_days.desc_en: Busy-hours breakdown for each day of the week.
popular_times.popular_times_by_days.title_zh: 一周内每天的繁忙时段明细。

popular_times.sunday.desc_en: Busy hours on Sunday; the same structure applies to the other weekdays.
popular_times.sunday.title_zh: 周日的繁忙时段；其余各工作日采用相同结构。

popular_times.popular_index.desc_en: Relative popularity index from 0 to 100; higher means a busier time of day.
popular_times.popular_index.title_zh: 相对热度指数，范围 0 到 100；数值越高表示该时段越繁忙。

local_business_links.desc_en: Direct interaction options offered for the business in search results.
local_business_links.title_zh: 搜索结果中为该商家提供的直接互动入口列表。

local_business_links.type.desc_en: Element type marker of the interaction link, e.g. `menu`.
local_business_links.type.title_zh: 互动链接的元素类型标记，例如 `menu`。

local_business_links.title.desc_en: Title of the link, e.g. the domain of the online menu system.
local_business_links.title.title_zh: 链接标题，例如在线菜单系统的域名。

local_business_links.url.desc_en: URL the interaction link points to.

local_business_links.delivery_services.desc_en: Available delivery services for the business.
local_business_links.delivery_services.title_zh: 该商家可用的配送服务。

local_business_links.is_directory_item.desc_en: Whether this entry belongs to a directory of businesses sharing one address (e.g. a mall); for a parent directory item the value is `null`.
local_business_links.is_directory_item.title_zh: 该条目是否属于共用同一地址的商家目录（如商场）；若其为目录的父级条目，取值为 `null`。

directory.desc_en: Businesses located within the target establishment that share its address.
directory.title_zh: 位于目标商家内部、与其共用地址的商家集合。

directory.title.desc_en: Business name of the directory entry.

directory.type.desc_en: Element type marker of the directory item, e.g. `maps_search`.
directory.type.title_zh: 目录条目的元素类型标记，例如 `maps_search`。

directory.rank_group.desc_en: Position of this entry within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.
directory.rank_group.title_zh: 该条目在相同 `type` 元素分组内的位置。

directory.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute rank among all the elements.
directory.rank_absolute.title_zh: 在全部元素中的绝对排名。

directory.url.desc_en: Absolute URL of the business website.

directory.rating.desc_en: Aggregated rating of the entity, as shown in the SERP.
directory.rating.title_zh: 该实体的综合评分，与 SERP 中展示的一致。

directory.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
directory.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

directory.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes the rating is based on.
directory.votes_count.title_zh: 该评分所依据的投票数。

directory.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
directory.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

directory.rating_distribution.desc_en: Breakdown of how many 1- to 5-star ratings the business received.
directory.rating_distribution.title_zh: 该商家所获 1 至 5 星评分各自数量的分布。

directory.snippet.desc_en: Additional descriptive information about the business.
directory.snippet.title_zh: 关于该商家的附加描述信息。

directory.address_info.desc_en: Object holding the structured address components of the business.
directory.address_info.title_zh: 包含商家结构化地址组成部分的对象。

directory.borough.desc_en: Administrative unit or district the business location belongs to.
directory.borough.title_zh: 商家所在的行政区或辖区。

directory.city.desc_en: City where the business is located.

directory.region.desc_en: DMA region of the business location.
directory.region.title_zh: 商家所在的 DMA 区域。

directory.country_code.desc_en: ISO country code of the business location.
directory.country_code.title_zh: 商家所在地的 ISO 国家代码。

directory.place_id.desc_en: Google place id of the local establishment featured in the element.
directory.place_id.title_zh: 元素中所示本地商家的 Google place id。

directory.main_image.desc_en: URL of the main image shown on the Google My Business profile.
directory.main_image.title_zh: Google 商家资料中展示的主图 URL。

directory.total_photos.desc_en: Total number of images featured on the Google My Business profile.
directory.total_photos.title_zh: Google 商家资料中收录的图片总数。

directory.category.desc_en: Primary Google My Business category that best describes the business.
directory.category.title_zh: 最能概括该商家的 Google 商家主分类。

directory.category_ids.desc_en: Universal category IDs that stay constant regardless of country.
directory.category_ids.title_zh: 通用分类 ID，不随所选国家变化。

directory.work_hours.desc_en: Working hours information of the establishment.

directory.feature_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the element in the SERP (feature id).
directory.feature_id.title_zh: SERP 中该元素的唯一标识（feature id）。

directory.cid.desc_en: Google-defined client id (cid); can be used with the Google Reviews API to fetch the full review list.
directory.cid.title_zh: Google 定义的客户端 id（cid）；可配合 Google Reviews API 获取完整评论列表。

directory.latitude.desc_en: Latitude of the establishment on Google Maps.
directory.latitude.title_zh: 商家在 Google 地图上的纬度。

directory.longitude.desc_en: Longitude of the establishment on Google Maps.
directory.longitude.title_zh: 商家在 Google 地图上的经度。

directory.is_claimed.desc_en: Whether the entity is verified by its owner on Google Maps.
directory.is_claimed.title_zh: 该实体是否已由其所有者在 Google 地图上认领验证。

directory.local_justifications.desc_en: Google local justification snippets explaining why the business appears for the query.
directory.local_justifications.title_zh: Google 本地佐证片段，说明该商家为何会出现在该查询结果中。

directory.is_directory_item.desc_en: Whether this entry belongs to a directory of businesses sharing one address; for a parent directory item the value is `null`.
directory.is_directory_item.title_zh: 该条目是否属于共用同一地址的商家目录；若其为目录的父级条目，取值为 `null`。

directory.price_level.desc_en: Price level of the property; business meaning: `inexpensive`, `moderate`, `expensive`, `very_expensive`; `null` when unavailable.
directory.price_level.title_zh: 场所的价格档次；业务含义：`inexpensive` 便宜、`moderate` 适中、`expensive` 偏贵、`very_expensive` 非常贵；无信息时为 `null`。

directory.hotel_rating.desc_en: Hotel class rating ranging 1-5 stars; `null` when unavailable.
directory.hotel_rating.title_zh: 酒店星级评定，范围 1 至 5 星；无信息时为 `null`。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch. The task remains retrievable for 30 days after creation.
id.title_zh: 要拉取结果的任务 UUID。任务自创建起 30 天内可随时取回结果。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual payload of this task.
result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task that is now ready to be collected; pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to download the results.
result.id.title_zh: 已完成、可供拉取的任务的 UUID；将其传给对应的 `task_get` 端点即可下载结果。

result.se.desc_en: Search engine the completed task was set for.
result.se.title_zh: 该已完成任务所针对的搜索引擎。

result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the completed task was set for.
result.se_type.title_zh: 该已完成任务所针对的搜索引擎类型。

result.date_posted.desc_en: Timestamp (UTC) when the task was originally submitted.

result.tag.desc_en: User-defined label that was attached to the task when it was created, echoed back for matching.
result.tag.title_zh: 创建任务时附加的用户自定义标签，原样回显以便匹配。

result.endpoint.desc_en: Relative endpoint URL to call for collecting this completed task's results.
result.endpoint.title_zh: 用于拉取该已完成任务结果的相对端点 URL。

keyword.desc_en: Name of the local establishment to look up (up to 700 characters); percent-encoding is decoded. This field can also carry a Google-defined `cid` to target a specific establishment.
keyword.title_zh: 要查询的本地商家名称（最多 700 个字符）；会解码百分号转义。该字段也可传入 Google 定义的 `cid` 以精确定位某个商家。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` runs at normal priority, `2` runs at high priority for faster turnaround at an extra charge.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 为普通优先级，`2` 为高优先级，可更快返回但会额外计费。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`) that sets the geographic context of the search. Provide this or `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; the available list comes from the corresponding `/locations` endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于设定搜索的地理范围。需在此与 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 中择一提供；可用列表来自对应的 `/locations` 端点。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code that sets the geographic context of the search. Provide this or `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; the available list comes from the corresponding `/locations` endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区代码，用于设定搜索的地理范围。需在此与 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 中择一提供；可用列表来自对应的 `/locations` 端点。

location_coordinate.desc_en: GPS coordinates that set the geographic context of the search, in `latitude,longitude` (some endpoints also accept a radius). Provide this or `location_name`/`location_code`.
location_coordinate.title_zh: 用于设定搜索地理范围的 GPS 坐标，格式为 `latitude,longitude`（部分端点还接受半径）。需与 `location_name`/`location_code` 择一提供。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name (e.g. `English`) for the search. Provide this or `language_code`; the available list comes from the corresponding `/languages` endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 搜索所用语言的完整名称（如 `English`）。需与 `language_code` 择一提供；可用列表来自对应的 `/languages` 端点。

language_code.desc_en: Language code (e.g. `en`) for the search. Provide this or `language_name`; the available list comes from the corresponding `/languages` endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 搜索所用的语言代码（如 `en`）。需与 `language_name` 择一提供；可用列表来自对应的 `/languages` 端点。

depth.desc_en: Number of updates to parse. Best set in multiples of ten since updates are processed ten at a time; Google returns at most 4490 updates.
depth.title_zh: 要解析的动态更新条数。建议设为 10 的倍数，因为系统每次处理十条；Google 最多返回 4490 条更新。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task (up to 255 characters). It is echoed back in the response `data` so you can match results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务自定义的标签（最多 255 个字符）。会在响应的 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求匹配。

postback_url.desc_en: URL to which the completed task results are pushed via POST (gzip-compressed). Use the `$id`/`$tag` placeholders in the URL to have them substituted automatically.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后用于以 POST 推送结果（gzip 压缩）的回调 URL。可在 URL 中使用 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符，系统会自动替换为实际值。

pingback_url.desc_en: URL that is pinged via GET when the task completes, signalling that results are ready to collect. Supports the `$id`/`$tag` placeholders.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时通过 GET 触达的通知 URL，用于提示结果已就绪。支持 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual payload of this task.
result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.keyword.desc_en: Keyword echoed from the POST request, with percent-encoding decoded (a `+` becomes a space).
result.keyword.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的关键词，已解码百分号转义（`+` 会被还原为空格）。

result.type.desc_en: Search engine type echoed from the POST request.
result.type.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎类型。

result.se_domain.desc_en: Search engine domain echoed from the POST request.
result.se_domain.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎域名。

result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the POST request.
result.location_code.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的地区代码。

result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the POST request.
result.language_code.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的语言代码。

result.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the search engine results page, so you can verify the data against the live SERP.
result.check_url.title_zh: 指向搜索引擎结果页的直达 URL，可用于将数据与实时 SERP 核对。

result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp when the result was collected, formatted `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.datetime.title_zh: 结果采集的时间（UTC），格式为 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.title.desc_en: Name of the local establishment that the 'reviews' SERP element collects reviews for.
result.title.title_zh: SERP 中 'reviews' 元素所采集评论对应的本地商家名称。

result.sub_title.desc_en: Supplementary information (such as the address) shown beneath the title of the 'reviews' element.
result.sub_title.title_zh: 'reviews' 元素标题下方展示的补充信息（如地址）。

result.rating.desc_en: Aggregated rating of the entity, as shown in the SERP.
result.rating.title_zh: 该实体的综合评分，与 SERP 中展示的一致。

result.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
result.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

result.value.desc_en: Average rating value computed from all reviews.
result.value.title_zh: 基于全部评论计算出的平均评分值。

result.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes (ratings) the rating is based on.
result.votes_count.title_zh: 该评分所依据的投票（打分）数量。

result.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
result.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

result.feature_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the 'reviews' SERP element (feature id).
result.feature_id.title_zh: SERP 中 'reviews' 元素的唯一标识（feature id）。

result.place_id.desc_en: Google-assigned unique identifier of the business location (place id).
result.place_id.title_zh: Google 为该商家地点分配的唯一标识（place id）。

result.cid.desc_en: Google-defined client id (cid), a unique id of the local establishment.
result.cid.title_zh: Google 定义的客户端 id（cid），本地商家的唯一标识。

result.reviews_count.desc_en: Total number of reviews available for the establishment.
result.reviews_count.title_zh: 该商家可获取的评论总数。

result.items_count.desc_en: Number of elements returned in the `items` array; raise the `depth` parameter at task creation to get more.
result.items_count.title_zh: `items` 数组中返回的元素数量；在创建任务时调大 `depth` 参数可获取更多。

items.desc_en: Review entries collected for the establishment; raise `depth` at task creation to retrieve more.
items.title_zh: 为该商家采集到的评论条目；创建任务时调大 `depth` 可获取更多。

items.type.desc_en: Element type marker of the review entry.
items.type.title_zh: 评论条目的元素类型标记。

items.rank_group.desc_en: Position of this entry within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.
items.rank_group.title_zh: 该条目在相同 `type` 元素分组内的位置。

items.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute position of this review among all listed reviews.
items.rank_absolute.title_zh: 该评论在全部已列出评论中的绝对位置。

items.position.desc_en: Alignment of the review within the SERP layout.
items.position.title_zh: 评论在 SERP 版式中的对齐位置。

items.xpath.desc_en: XPath locating this review element within the parsed page.
items.xpath.title_zh: 在解析页面中定位该评论元素的 XPath。

items.review_text.desc_en: Body text of the review (auto-translated when applicable).
items.review_text.title_zh: 评论正文内容（在适用时为自动翻译后的文本）。

items.original_review_text.desc_en: Review body in its original language, with no auto-translation applied.
items.original_review_text.title_zh: 评论正文的原始语言版本，未做自动翻译。

items.time_ago.desc_en: Relative publication time of the review in 'time ago' wording.
items.time_ago.title_zh: 评论发布时间的相对表述（'time ago' 格式）。

items.timestamp.desc_en: Absolute publication time of the review in UTC, `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
items.timestamp.title_zh: 评论发布的绝对时间（UTC），格式 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

items.rating.desc_en: Rating score given by the reviewer.
items.rating.title_zh: 该评论作者给出的评分。

items.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
items.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

items.value.desc_en: Numeric value of the reviewer's rating.
items.value.title_zh: 该评论作者评分的数值。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of helpfulness votes this review received.
items.votes_count.title_zh: 该评论获得的有用性投票数。

items.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
items.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

items.reviews_count.desc_en: Total number of reviews the reviewer has submitted overall.
items.reviews_count.title_zh: 该评论作者累计提交的评论总数。

items.photos_count.desc_en: Total number of photos the reviewer has submitted overall.
items.photos_count.title_zh: 该评论作者累计提交的照片总数。

items.local_guide.desc_en: Whether the reviewer holds Google 'Local Guide' status.
items.local_guide.title_zh: 该评论作者是否拥有 Google '本地向导'（Local Guide）身份。

items.profile_name.desc_en: Display name of the reviewer's profile.
items.profile_name.title_zh: 评论作者的资料显示名称。

items.profile_url.title_zh: 评论作者的资料页 URL。

items.review_url.desc_en: URL pointing directly to this review.
items.review_url.title_zh: 直接指向该评论的 URL。

items.profile_image_url.desc_en: URL of the reviewer's profile image.
items.profile_image_url.title_zh: 评论作者的头像图片 URL。

items.owner_answer.desc_en: Owner's reply text to the review (auto-translated when applicable).
items.owner_answer.title_zh: 商家所有者对该评论的回复文本（适用时为自动翻译）。

items.original_owner_answer.desc_en: Owner's reply in its original language, with no auto-translation applied.
items.original_owner_answer.title_zh: 商家所有者回复的原始语言版本，未做自动翻译。

items.owner_time_ago.desc_en: Relative time of the owner's reply in 'time ago' wording.
items.owner_time_ago.title_zh: 商家回复时间的相对表述（'time ago' 格式）。

items.owner_timestamp.desc_en: Absolute time of the owner's reply in UTC, `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
items.owner_timestamp.title_zh: 商家回复的绝对时间（UTC），格式 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

items.review_id.desc_en: Unique identifier of the review on Google.
items.review_id.title_zh: 该评论在 Google 上的唯一标识。

items.images.desc_en: Images attached to the review by the reviewer.
items.images.title_zh: 评论作者随评论附上的图片。

items.alt.desc_en: Alt text of the review image.
items.alt.title_zh: 评论图片的 alt 替代文本。

items.url.title_zh: 来自 Google 的相关图片 URL。

items.image_url.desc_en: URL of an image featured in the review.
items.image_url.title_zh: 评论中所附图片的 URL。

items.review_highlights.desc_en: Highlighted review criteria together with their assessments.
items.review_highlights.title_zh: 评论中被高亮的评价维度及其评价结论。

items.assessment.desc_en: Assessment given for the reviewed feature.
items.assessment.title_zh: 针对被评价特性给出的评价结论。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch. The task remains retrievable for 30 days after creation.
id.title_zh: 要拉取结果的任务 UUID。任务自创建起 30 天内可随时取回结果。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual payload of this task.
result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.id.desc_en: UUID of a completed task that is now ready to be collected; pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to download the results.
result.id.title_zh: 已完成、可供拉取的任务的 UUID；将其传给对应的 `task_get` 端点即可下载结果。

result.se.desc_en: Search engine the completed task was set for.
result.se.title_zh: 该已完成任务所针对的搜索引擎。

result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the completed task was set for.
result.se_type.title_zh: 该已完成任务所针对的搜索引擎类型。

result.date_posted.desc_en: Timestamp (UTC) when the task was originally submitted.

result.tag.desc_en: User-defined label that was attached to the task when it was created, echoed back for matching.
result.tag.title_zh: 创建任务时附加的用户自定义标签，原样回显以便匹配。

result.endpoint.desc_en: Relative endpoint URL to call for collecting this completed task's results.
result.endpoint.title_zh: 用于拉取该已完成任务结果的相对端点 URL。

targets.desc_en: Target page URLs to analyse, each an absolute URL including the scheme; up to 10 targets, each billed separately.
targets.title_zh: 要分析的目标页面 URL，每个都需为含协议头的绝对 URL；最多 10 个目标，每个目标单独计费。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task (up to 255 characters). It is echoed back in the response `data` so you can match results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务自定义的标签（最多 255 个字符）。会在响应的 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求匹配。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Array holding the actual payload of this task.
result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.page_url.desc_en: Target page URL this Reddit data corresponds to, matching an entry from the `targets` array.
result.page_url.title_zh: 该 Reddit 数据所对应的目标页面 URL，与 `targets` 数组中的某项一致。

result.reddit reviews.desc_en: Reddit mentions/posts associated with the page_url.
result.reddit reviews.title_zh: 与 page_url 关联的 Reddit 提及/帖子。

result.subreddit.desc_en: Name of the subreddit where the URL was shared.
result.subreddit.title_zh: 分享该 URL 所在的 subreddit 名称。

result.author_name.desc_en: Nickname of the user who posted the URL in the subreddit.
result.author_name.title_zh: 在该 subreddit 中发布该 URL 的用户昵称。

result.title.title_zh: 该 subreddit 帖子的标题。

result.permalink.desc_en: Permanent URL of the subreddit post.
result.permalink.title_zh: 该 subreddit 帖子的固定链接 URL。

result.subreddit_members.desc_en: Number of members in the subreddit.
result.subreddit_members.title_zh: 该 subreddit 的成员数量。

url_path.desc_en: Tripadvisor page URL path of the business entity. Provide this or `keyword`. You can obtain it from the Tripadvisor Search items' `url_path`.
url_path.title_zh: 商家在 Tripadvisor 上的页面 URL 路径。需与 `keyword` 择一提供。可从 Tripadvisor 搜索结果条目的 `url_path` 获取。

keyword.desc_en: Name of an existing Tripadvisor business or place (up to 700 characters; percent-encoding decoded). Provide this or `url_path`.
keyword.title_zh: Tripadvisor 上已存在的商家或地点名称（最多 700 个字符；会解码百分号转义）。需与 `url_path` 择一提供。

location_name.desc_en: Full location name; required if you specify neither `location_code` nor `url_path`. The available list comes from the Tripadvisor `/locations` endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 完整地区名称；若既未指定 `location_code` 也未指定 `url_path` 则必填。可用列表来自 Tripadvisor `/locations` 端点。

location_code.desc_en: Numeric location code; required if you specify neither `location_name` nor `url_path`. The available list comes from the Tripadvisor `/locations` endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 数字地区代码；若既未指定 `location_name` 也未指定 `url_path` 则必填。可用列表来自 Tripadvisor `/locations` 端点。

priority.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` runs at normal priority, `2` runs at high priority for faster turnaround at an extra charge.
priority.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 为普通优先级，`2` 为高优先级，可更快返回但会额外计费。

language_name.desc_en: Full language name. Using this field incurs one extra request charge. The available list comes from the Tripadvisor `/languages` endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 完整语言名称。使用该字段会额外计费一次请求。可用列表来自 Tripadvisor `/languages` 端点。

language_code.desc_en: Language code. Using this field incurs one extra request charge. The available list comes from the Tripadvisor `/languages` endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 语言代码。使用该字段会额外计费一次请求。可用列表来自 Tripadvisor `/languages` 端点。

depth.desc_en: Number of reviews to parse; best set in multiples of ten (processed ten at a time). Default 10, max 4490. Billing is per SERP of up to 10 results.
depth.title_zh: 要解析的评论数量；建议设为 10 的倍数（每次处理十条）。默认 10，最大 4490。计费以每 10 条结果一个 SERP 为单位。

ratings.desc_en: Filter reviews by Tripadvisor traveler rating; business meaning of values: `excellent`, `very_good`, `average`, `poor`, `terrible`. Multiple values allowed.
ratings.title_zh: 按 Tripadvisor 旅行者评分筛选评论；取值业务含义：`excellent` 极佳、`very_good` 很好、`average` 一般、`poor` 较差、`terrible` 很差。可同时指定多个值。

visit_type.desc_en: Filter by traveler type; business meaning of values: `families`, `couples`, `solo`, `business`, `friends`. Multiple values allowed.
visit_type.title_zh: 按出行者类型筛选；取值业务含义：`families` 家庭、`couples` 情侣、`solo` 独行、`business` 商务、`friends` 朋友。可同时指定多个值。

months.desc_en: Filter by the month of the traveler's visit, given as month names (e.g. `january`). Multiple values allowed.
months.title_zh: 按旅行者到访的月份筛选，以月份英文名给出（如 `january`）。可同时指定多个值。

search_reviews_keyword.desc_en: Return only reviews that contain the specified keyword.
search_reviews_keyword.title_zh: 仅返回包含指定关键词的评论。

sort_by.desc_en: Sort order of the returned reviews; business meaning: `most_recent` newest first, `detailed_reviews` most detailed first.
sort_by.title_zh: 返回评论的排序方式；业务含义：`most_recent` 最新优先、`detailed_reviews` 内容最详尽优先。

translate_reviews.desc_en: When `true`, reviews are translated to the language matching the `url_path` (e.g. Italian for a `tripadvisor.it` path).
translate_reviews.title_zh: 为 `true` 时，评论会被翻译为与 `url_path` 匹配的语言（例如 `tripadvisor.it` 路径对应意大利语）。

tag.desc_en: Your own label for the task (up to 255 characters). It is echoed back in the response `data` so you can match results to requests.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务自定义的标签（最多 255 个字符）。会在响应的 `data` 中回显，便于将结果与请求匹配。

postback_url.desc_en: URL to which the completed task results are pushed via POST (gzip-compressed). Use the `$id`/`$tag` placeholders in the URL to have them substituted automatically.
postback_url.title_zh: 任务完成后用于以 POST 推送结果（gzip 压缩）的回调 URL。可在 URL 中使用 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符，系统会自动替换为实际值。

pingback_url.desc_en: URL that is pinged via GET when the task completes, signalling that results are ready to collect. Supports the `$id`/`$tag` placeholders.
pingback_url.title_zh: 任务完成时通过 GET 触达的通知 URL，用于提示结果已就绪。支持 `$id`/`$tag` 占位符。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

version.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time the platform spent handling the whole request, in seconds.
version.time.title_zh: 平台处理整个请求所花费的时间，单位为秒。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.keyword.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的关键词；若请求中指定了 `alias`，此处会返回该值。

result.se_domain.desc_en: Search engine domain echoed from the POST request.
result.se_domain.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎域名。

result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the POST request.
result.location_code.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的地区代码。

result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the POST request.
result.language_code.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的语言代码。

result.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the Tripadvisor results, so you can verify the data.
result.check_url.title_zh: 指向 Tripadvisor 结果的直达 URL，可用于核对数据。

result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp when the result was collected, formatted `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.datetime.title_zh: 结果采集的时间（UTC），格式为 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.item_types.desc_en: Item types present in the result; possible value: `tripadvisor_search_organic`.
result.item_types.title_zh: 结果中出现的元素类型；可能取值为 `tripadvisor_search_organic`。

result.items_count.desc_en: Number of elements returned in the `items` array; raise the `depth` parameter at task creation to get more.
result.items_count.title_zh: `items` 数组中返回的元素数量；在创建任务时调大 `depth` 参数可获取更多。

items.desc_en: Tripadvisor search listing results; raise `depth` at task creation for more.
items.title_zh: Tripadvisor 搜索列表结果；创建任务时调大 `depth` 可获取更多。

items.rank_group.desc_en: Position of this entry within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.
items.rank_group.title_zh: 该条目在相同 `type` 元素分组内的位置。

items.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute rank among all the listed results.
items.rank_absolute.title_zh: 在全部已列出结果中的绝对排名。

items.url_path.desc_en: Tripadvisor page URL path of the business; reuse it with the Tripadvisor Reviews endpoint to collect its reviews.
items.url_path.title_zh: 商家的 Tripadvisor 页面 URL 路径；可配合 Tripadvisor Reviews 端点采集其评论。

items.is_sponsored.desc_en: Whether the item is a paid (sponsored) Tripadvisor placement.
items.is_sponsored.title_zh: 该条目是否为 Tripadvisor 上的付费（赞助）展示位。

items.reviews_count.desc_en: Total number of reviews for the business.

items.price_rate.desc_en: Average price rate of the place.
items.price_rate.title_zh: 该地点的平均价格水平。

items.rating.desc_en: Rating score of the establishment submitted by reviewers.
items.rating.title_zh: 评论者给出的该商家评分。

items.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
items.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes the establishment received.

items.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
items.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

id.title_zh: 要拉取结果的任务 UUID。任务自创建起 30 天内可随时取回结果。

version.cost.desc_en: Total amount charged for all tasks in this response, in USD.
version.cost.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

version.tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects contained in the `tasks` array.
version.tasks_count.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务对象数量。

version.tasks_error.desc_en: Number of task objects in the `tasks` array that finished with an error; if greater than zero, inspect each task's own status code.
version.tasks_error.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中以错误结束的任务数量；若大于 0，应逐个检查任务自身的状态码。

tasks.desc_en: Array of task objects; each entry carries the per-task status plus its `result` payload.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素携带单个任务的状态及其 `result` 结果数据。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this task in UUID format. Reuse it to fetch results from the matching `task_get` endpoint within the task's retention window.
tasks.id.title_zh: 本任务在系统中的唯一标识，UUID 格式。可在任务保留期内用它向对应的 `task_get` 端点拉取结果。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Status code of this individual task (range 10000-60000). A value in the 20000 range means success; other ranges signal queued, in-progress or error states.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（范围 10000-60000）。20000 区间表示成功，其它区间表示排队、处理中或错误等状态。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message describing the outcome of this task, paired with `tasks.status_code`.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 描述该任务处理结果的可读信息，与 `tasks.status_code` 配套。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent processing this task, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 处理该任务所花费的时间，单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 该单个任务的计费金额，单位为美元（USD）。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced this task, useful for tracing which call the result belongs to.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的端点 URL 路径片段，便于追溯结果对应的调用。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters you submitted for this task, returned so you can correlate the result with the original request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 回显你为该任务提交的参数，便于将结果与原始请求对应起来。

result.desc_en: Result array; for this task-creation response the value is `null`.
result.title_zh: 结果数组；对于本任务创建响应，其值为 `null`。

version.desc_en: Top-level API metadata object describing this response, including the API version and the aggregated status, timing and cost of the request.
version.title_zh: 顶层 API 元数据对象，包含本次响应的 API 版本，以及整批请求的聚合状态、耗时与计费信息。

version.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the whole request. Use it as the first signal of success or failure before reading the tasks array; the full code list is in the DataForSEO errors reference.
version.status_code.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。读取 tasks 数组前应先用它判断请求整体成功或失败；完整状态码列表见 DataForSEO 错误码文档。

version.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code, e.g. `Ok` or an error explanation.
version.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码配套的可读说明信息，例如 `Ok` 或错误原因。

result.title_zh: 承载该任务实际结果数据的数组。

result.keyword.desc_en: Keyword echoed from the POST request.
result.keyword.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的关键词。

result.se_domain.desc_en: Search engine domain echoed from the POST request.
result.se_domain.title_zh: 从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎域名。

result.check_url.desc_en: Direct URL to the search engine results page, so you can verify the data against the live SERP.
result.check_url.title_zh: 指向搜索引擎结果页的直达 URL，可用于将数据与实时 SERP 核对。

result.datetime.desc_en: UTC timestamp when the result was collected, formatted `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`.
result.datetime.title_zh: 结果采集的时间（UTC），格式为 `yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`。

result.items_count.desc_en: Number of items in the results array; raise `depth` at task creation for more.
result.items_count.title_zh: 结果数组中的元素数量；创建任务时调大 `depth` 可获取更多。

items.desc_en: Trustpilot search listing results; raise `depth` at task creation for more.
items.title_zh: Trustpilot 搜索列表结果；创建任务时调大 `depth` 可获取更多。

items.rank_group.desc_en: Position of this entry within the group of elements sharing the same `type`.
items.rank_group.title_zh: 该条目在相同 `type` 元素分组内的位置。

items.rank_absolute.desc_en: Absolute rank among all the listed results.
items.rank_absolute.title_zh: 在全部已列出结果中的绝对排名。

items.url.desc_en: URL of the establishment on Trustpilot.
items.url.title_zh: 商家在 Trustpilot 上的 URL。

items.reviews_count.desc_en: Total number of reviews for the establishment.

items.rating.desc_en: Rating score of the establishment submitted by reviewers.
items.rating.title_zh: 评论者给出的该商家评分。

items.rating_type.desc_en: Scale used to express the rating; the business meaning is: `Max5` rated out of 5, `Percents` expressed as a percentage, `CustomMax` rated against a custom maximum.
items.rating_type.title_zh: 评分所采用的标度，业务含义为：`Max5` 表示满分 5 分制，`Percents` 表示百分比制，`CustomMax` 表示自定义满分制。

items.votes_count.desc_en: Number of votes the establishment received.

items.rating_max.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the given `rating_type` (for example 5 when the type is `Max5`).
items.rating_max.title_zh: 对应 `rating_type` 的最大可能取值（例如类型为 `Max5` 时为 5）。

id.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch. The task remains retrievable for 30 days after creation.
id.title_zh: 要拉取结果的任务 UUID。任务自创建起 30 天内可随时取回结果。
